description: A degree, certificate, or course of study a student enrolls in to take courses. Each program carries its own enrollment, academic, and financial settings. Create one for every offering students can apply to or enroll in.

fields.description: Time-based: use terms for student progress; Credit-based: students may enroll in courses for any term; track credit completion
fields.label: Enrollment Type

fields.description: Maximum credits a student may apply toward this program from transfer / partner-transcript imports. 0 = no limit. Enforced when a Partner Transcript Import Batch is submitted.
fields.label: Max Transfer Credits

fields.description: Maximum number of years a student may stay enrolled in this program before they must graduate (fractional years supported, e.g. 7.5). 0 = no limit. The Program Enrollment's max graduation date is auto-set to enrollment_date + this many years on submission.
fields.label: Max Years to Graduate

fields.description: When checked, students may file a Graduation Request from the audit page. Disable for programs where graduation is fully registrar-driven.
fields.label: Students Can Request Graduation

fields.description: When the request becomes available to the student. "Enrolled in final courses" lets the student request as soon as the in-progress courses would close out the program. "Passed final courses" waits until grades are final.
fields.label: Graduation Request Trigger
fields.options:
Enrolled in final courses
Passed final courses

fields.description: Top of the GPA scale (US = 4, others vary).
fields.label: Basis for GPA

fields.description: When checked, GPA is credit-weighted: Σ(points × credits) / Σ(credits). When unchecked, GPA is the simple mean of points across counted rows.
fields.label: Credit-weighted GPA

fields.description: Second gate for transferred PEC rows: a transfer counts in GPA only when this Program AND the source Partner Seminary's `Counts in GPA` are both checked.
fields.label: Accept Transfer Grades in GPA

fields.description: Minimum cumulative GPA required to graduate. Defaults from the Program Level (re-pulled when the level changes) but is overridable here. 0 = no minimum. Enforced as a graduation-candidacy gate.
fields.label: Minimum Graduation GPA

fields.description: Honors levels for this program. The highest level whose Minimum GPA is met by the student is shown as `current_honor` on Program Enrollment.
fields.label: Honors Levels

fields.description: Maximum share of class meetings a student may miss before being flagged at risk of failing for absences. Each Course Schedule converts this to a whole-number limit (% × scheduled meetings), which the registrar can override. 0 = no attendance limit by default.
fields.label: Default Max Absence %
Enrollment Type will regulate which of the options below will be used for student progress (the other may be used for statistical purposes)

fields.description: The same course may be used in different programs, in different terms and with different number of credits.

ALL courses of the program must be listed here. See also the tab "Tracks" where you can configure if a course is mandatory for specific tracks of this program. Alternatively, you can go to Courses, select all courses for this program, and in actions (top right button), Add to Program, and select this program.
fields.label: Courses of this program (use Term number for guiding the student progress in Time-based programs)

fields.description: This may be used to filter or sort programs.
fields.label: Duration (numbers only)

fields.description: Allow students to declare more than one emphasis in this program.
fields.label: Allow Multiple Emphases

fields.description: If set, students who do not declare or meet a specific emphasis will fall back to this track (e.g. General Studies).
fields.label: Fallback Emphasis

fields.description: Shared Credit Pool: all emphases share the same credit total. Additional Credits Required: 2nd+ emphases add their track credits on top of the program total.
fields.label: Emphasis Overlap Policy
fields.options:
Shared Credit Pool
Additional Credits Required

fields.description: Note: The courses available on the previous page should be ALL the courses in the program. Use this only to specify what is mandatory for students on a particular track.
fields.label: You can specify courses per program track

fields.description: Mirrored from Program Level. Programs with no graduation/transcript concept skip GPA, graduation audit, alumni transition, and Academic Review on withdrawal.
fields.label: Is Ongoing

fields.description: Bypass enrollment invoicing and skip Financial Review on withdrawal.
fields.label: Free Program

fields.description: When checked, a Course Enrollment in this program lands at 'Awaiting Payment' until the student pays the invoice (or meets the percent below). Forced off for Free Programs.
fields.label: Require Payment Before Enrollment

fields.description: Minimum cumulative payment (as a percentage of the CEI's invoiced total) required to advance from 'Awaiting Payment' to 'Submitted'. 100 = fully paid; 50 = half-down accepted.
fields.label: Minimum Payment %

fields.description: When checked, students can only create a Draft enrollment for this program; a registrar must apply Submit before the student can pay. When unchecked, the student's enrollment auto-submits to Awaiting Payment.
fields.label: Require Staff Verification of Course Enrollments

fields.description: Use this to describe details of program duration, before the searchable fields below.
fields.label: Program Duration (text)

fields.description: Continuous: applicants can apply any time; the public CTA tags them to the current Academic Term. Timed: applications are only accepted during published Term Admission windows.
fields.label: Enrollment Mode

fields.description: Naming series for Student Applicant records created for this program (e.g., MDIV-APP-.####.). Leave blank to use the system default.
fields.label: Applicant Naming Series

fields.description: Web Form prospective students use to apply to this program. Leave blank to use the seminary default.
fields.label: Application Web Form

fields.description: Show open Term Admission windows on the public Program page. Has no effect for Continuous programs.
fields.label: Display Enrollment Windows on Web

fields.description: Show the 'Apply to be our student' CTA on the public Program page. For Timed programs, one CTA is rendered per open window.
fields.label: Display Apply CTA on Web

fields.description: The Program Blurb will appear on the Programs and Degrees page (alongside the program image and duration) and on top of its own page.
fields.label: Porgram Blurb

fields.description: Attach a square image for the program list
fields.label: Image for Blurb

fields.description: Optional Program Committee that owns this program. Degree programs span academic departments, so academic ownership flows through courses, not the program.
fields.label: Academic Unit

name: Program
